GENBU · GCF v1 PoC

client-side WebCrypto · zero network · proves H1 (I2 stateless) + H2 (byte interop) + B-5 (service-independent decrypt)

Key (shared with CLI)

Same hex string works in genbu_poc.py. The key never leaves this tab.

Encrypt → .gcf

—

Decrypt / Inspect .gcf

—

S3 · interop self-test

Runs the fixed golden vector through this browser's WebCrypto and compares to the value baked into the Python test suite. PASS ⟹ the two runtimes are byte-identical.
idle
—
H3 (large files): this mock uses whole-buffer WebCrypto — fine for the PoC, deferred to S5 memory probe.
GCF v1 layout: magic(4) · ver(1) · flags(1) · key_gen_id(2 BE) · SHA-256 checksum(32) · nonce(12) · ciphertext · tag(16).
